label: New Fed Chair
note: Monitor the policy lean of the next Fed chair. A more aggressively dovish chair can change the rate trajectory materially.

label: SpaceX IPO / Elon Signal
note: Delay or weak demand around a large Elon-linked IPO would be a negative read on market liquidity and sentiment.

label: AI IPO Pipeline
note: Large AI IPO execution and demand are important sentiment checks for AI-led market leadership.
